summary: Earning Projection Calculator feature VERIFIED. All chatbot projection queries return exact expected values. Multilingual support (English/Marathi/Hindi) working correctly. PRC Collect regression test PASSED.

chatbot_projection_10_referrals.query: If I get 10 more referrals, what will be my daily earning?

chatbot_projection_25_referrals_marathi.query: 25 referrals मिळाले तर daily earning किती?
chatbot_projection_25_referrals_marathi.response_language: Marathi - Bot responded in Marathi as expected

chatbot_projection_50_referrals.query: What if I bring 50 more referrals?

chatbot_balance_query.query: What is my current PRC balance?

chatbot_hindi_query.query: अगर मुझे 10 और referrals मिलें तो मेरी daily earning कितनी होगी?
chatbot_hindi_query.response: Bot responded in Hindi with 520.8 PRC/day projection

prc_collect_regression.session_reset: Timer reset to ~24 hours, earnings reset to 0

critical_code_review_comments: compute_projections function (lines 58-81): Correctly calculates projections for +5/+10/+25/+50/+100 referral scenarios using mining formulas
get_user_context (lines 159-251): Properly injects [USER_DATA] and [PROJECTION_DATA] into system prompt
SYSTEM_PROMPT (lines 85-156): Clear instructions for multilingual responses and projection handling
SupportChatbot.js: All data-testid attributes present for testing (chatbot-open-btn, chatbot-window, chatbot-input, chatbot-send-btn, chatbot-close-btn)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Earning Projection Calculator fully implemented and verified. Chatbot endpoint POST /api/ai/support-chat accepts {uid, message, session_id} and returns projections using pre-computed data. Test user has 0 direct referrals, so projections start from base 500 PRC/day. All projection values verified: +10→520.8, +25→545.48, +50→591.57, +100→672.43 PRC/day. Multilingual support working (English/Marathi/Hindi). PRC Collect bug fix from iteration_167 still working correctly.
